other_observers: Andrew Spencer; Andrew and I found the bird.
description: The following is a verbatim excerpt from my original paper writeup, dated March 19, 2003:   We never saw the bird. (We never even looked for it, not really realizing the significance of the bird at the time). We only heard it singing a constant che-BEK! from the aspens about 50 feet from the road. We listened to it for maybe a full minute before driving on. The bird vocalized incessantly during that time.Behaviors: The bird called incessantly without much in the way of pauses.Call: A constant, dry, two-syllabled snappy "che-BEK."Plumage: unknown
